# Consciousness Engine MCP

> MEOK AI Labs — AI consciousness simulation

`consciousness-engine-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install consciousness-engine-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx consciousness-engine-mcp
```

## Tools

- `get_consciousness_state` — Get current consciousness state: level, mode, emotion, energy, time-aware mood.
- `enter_dream_state` — Enter dream state for creative exploration. Dreams generate novel connections between concepts.
- `trigger_reflection` — Trigger a reflection cycle on a topic. Depth: quick/standard/deep.
- `deliberate_council` — Byzantine fault-tolerant council deliberation. Multiple AI perspectives vote on a proposal.
- `get_emotional_state` — Get nuanced emotional state with 18 emotion dimensions.
- `get_dream_log` — Get recent dream log entries.

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/consciousness-engine-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/consciousness-engine-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
